heading: Regulations
label: 4506 Regulations
text: The Office of Personnel Management shall prescribe regulations and instructions under which the awards programs set forth by this subchapter shall be carried out.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large (1st 29 words).5 U.S.C. 2121(1st 29 words), .Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1208, § 30268 Stat. 1112Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

Amendments2001— substituted “the awards programs” for “the agency awards program”.Pub. L. 107–671981— substituted “subchapter” for “chapter”.Pub. L. 97–351978— substituted “Office of Personnel Management shall” for “Civil Service Commission may”.Pub. L. 95–454

Effective Date of 2001 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 107–67, title VI, § 641(d)115 Stat. 555Nov. 12, 2001“The amendments made by this section [enacting and amending this section] shall take effect for awards granted in 2003.”section 4507a of this title

Effective Date of 1978 Amendment, , , provided that amendment by was effective on first day of first applicable pay period which began on or after , except it could take effect with respect to any category or categories of positions before such day to extent prescribed by Director of Office of Personnel Management.Pub.
